subject: Delayed food distribution in Sana'a
description: Beneficiaries report 3-week delay in monthly food basket distribution at Sana'a distribution center.

subject: Positive feedback on health awareness sessions
description: Community members expressed satisfaction with the health awareness sessions conducted in Al-Hudaydah district.

subject: Request for evening training sessions
description: Beneficiaries suggest conducting vocational training sessions in the evening to accommodate working participants.

subject: Inappropriate behavior by field officer
description: A beneficiary reported inappropriate behavior by a field officer during home visit in Amman.

subject: Appreciation for cash assistance program
description: Multiple beneficiaries expressed gratitude for the timely cash assistance received through the Jordan program.

subject: Mobile registration unit request
description: Community leaders in Zarqa suggest deploying mobile registration units for elderly and disabled beneficiaries.

subject: Exclusion from beneficiary list
description: A household in Taiz reports being excluded from the beneficiary targeting list despite meeting vulnerability criteria.

subject: Excellent vocational training program
description: Participants praised the quality of the tailoring and sewing vocational training program in Aden.

subject: SMS notifications for distribution dates
description: Beneficiaries suggest implementing SMS notification system to inform them about upcoming distribution dates.
